product_overview: TradeMind AI is a dark-themed, Streamlit-based financial analysis platform that combines multi-model AI forecasting, backtesting, technical analytics, and sentiment analysis for market research and strategy validation.
core_goals: Select markets and assets and load historical market data for analysis
Inspect price charts and technical indicators using the Neon Quant visual theme
Run ARIMA, Prophet, and LSTM forecasts independently or compare them side-by-side
Simulate trading strategies on historical data and review performance metrics and equity curves
Analyze sentiment from pasted text or fetched headlines and view aggregated news pulse

features.name: Global Neon Quant UI
features.description: A unified dark-themed interface for selecting markets/assets, browsing overview and raw data, and viewing Plotly charts rendered in the Neon Quant style.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Toggle sidebar to select market(s) and asset(s) -> Load historical data for selected assets -> See Overview populated with key metrics -> Switch to Raw Data tab -> See the time series table -> Observe Plotly charts rendered with the Neon Quant dark theme
Navigate to / -> Toggle sidebar to select market -> Enter a custom invalid ticker -> Load historical data -> See validation error indicating the ticker is invalid

features.name: Multi-Model AI Forecasting
features.description: Run single-model forecasts (ARIMA, Prophet, LSTM) or compare all models to produce dashed-line future price projections on the chart.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch to Forecast tab -> Select a forecasting model (ARIMA, Prophet, or LSTM) -> Provide historical window and model parameters -> Run forecast -> Observe a dashed-line forecast overlay on the Plotly price chart and forecast horizon metrics

Navigate to / -> Switch to Forecast tab -> Choose the compare-all-models action -> Run comparison -> Observe multiple dashed-line forecasts from ARIMA, Prophet, and LSTM on the chart for side-by-side comparison
Navigate to / -> Switch to Forecast tab -> Select a model with insufficient historical data -> Run forecast -> See validation error indicating insufficient data for model training

features.name: Backtesting Engine
features.description: Simulate historical performance of strategy rules (e.g., RSI, Mean Reversion) and surface metrics such as Total Return, Win Rate, and an equity curve versus Buy & Hold.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch to Backtest tab -> Select a strategy (e.g., RSI or Mean Reversion) -> Set capital and strategy parameters -> Run backtest -> View Total Return, Win Rate, and Equity Curve comparing the strategy to Buy & Hold
Navigate to / -> Switch to Backtest tab -> Enter negative or non-numeric capital -> Run backtest -> See validation error requesting a valid positive capital amount

features.name: Sentiment Analysis
features.description: Analyze sentiment from pasted headlines or fetched news to produce per-item polarity/subjectivity and an aggregated news pulse.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch to Sentiment tab -> Paste headlines or free-form news text into the input area -> Request analysis -> See per-item polarity and subjectivity results and a summarized news pulse
Navigate to / -> Switch to Sentiment tab -> Request fetch of recent headlines -> Request analysis -> See aggregated sentiment trend and news pulse visualization
Navigate to / -> Switch to Sentiment tab -> Leave the text area empty and request analysis -> See validation error prompting for input

features.name: Global Neon Quant UI
features.description: Professional dark-themed UI with glassmorphism and Space Grotesk typography.
user_interactions: Toggle sidebar to select markets and assets.

features.name: Multi-Model AI Forecasting
features.description: ARIMA, Prophet, and LSTM based price prediction.
user_interactions: Observe dashed-line forecast on Plotly chart.

features.name: Backtesting Engine
features.description: Historical strategy simulation and performance metrics.
user_interactions: View Total Return, Win Rate, and Equity Curve.

features.name: Sentiment Analysis
features.description: Text and news-based market mood detection.
user_interactions: Paste text headlines for direct analysis.
Click "Fetch & Analyze" for real-time news news pulse.
